---
title: "{{title}}"
subtitle: "{{client}} ({{department}})"
author: "{{author}}"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  officedown::rdocx_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r pkg, include=FALSE}
library(here)        # To generate relative file paths
library(flextable)   # Needed to display tables in Word
library(officedown)  # Needed for Word document features
library(officer)     # Needed for Word document features too

# Create list of captions
tot <- readRDS(here("data/tot/tot.rds"))
caption_list <- setNames(as.list(tot$caption), tot$name)
```

\newpage
